items.title: How 'Kemp-son' are solving England's batting problem
items.summary: A punishing 61-run partnership off 21 balls between Freya Kemp and Dani Gibson shows promise that England may have resolved their middle-order struggles in white-ball cricket.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Fastest World Cup to 100 goals in 68 years - are balls and breaks behind it?
items.summary: The 2026 World Cup becomes the fastest edition of the tournament to hit 100 goals since 1958 - with the landmark reached in the 33rd game. But what is behind the scoring spree?
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: 4 Takeaways From Germany's Stoppage-Time Win Past Ivory Coast
items.summary: Deniz Undav has been cooking for Germany and his two-goal effort ensured the four-time World Cup champions are in the knockouts.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
